title: RUSTPY-0007 — segfault class (memory-unsafety): recursion→stack-overflow, `_sre` Match mapping, object-core
one_line_repro: see report (recursion object-graphs; hash/compare/genericalias native paths)
prior_art: KNOWN-open umbrella #2796 (+ #1374): recursion -> native stack overflow
notes: Memory-unsafety segfault class (~9 SIGSEGV + 5 SIGABRT in fleet_01; 42 SIGABRT + 22 SIGSEGV in fleet_02). Dominant sub-cause = unbounded native recursion hashing/comparing a deep object (CPython raises RecursionError). RustPython PASSES the standard recursion tests; the triggers are fusil's specific object graphs. No panic signature -> rustpySEGV bucket.
